channel.title: Biagio Cyberspace
channel.description: Biagio Scaglia's personal blog: full-stack developer, UX/UI designer, and lover of the retro web.

item.title: Bullet Hell meets Action-RPG: Touhou Scarlet Curiosity Review (★´∀｀★)
item.description: My personal review of Ankake Spa's charming 3D action RPG Touhou Scarlet Curiosity on the Nintendo Switch. Beautiful levels, bullet-dodging bosses, and amazing music.

item.title: Anemoia: Nostalgia for a Cyber-Past We Never Lived (´◡`)
item.description: An exploration of anemoia — the longing for a past you've never personally experienced — and why the early 2000s web feels like home to so many of us today.

item.title: Biagio Cyberspace: How I Rebuilt the 2003 Web in 2026
item.description: A nostalgic journey through HTML tables, beveled SCSS styling, and pixel art to rediscover the joy of hand-crafted websites.

item.title: How Welcome to the NHK Changed My Life ｡ﾟ(ﾟ´ω`ﾟ)ﾟ｡
item.description: A deeply personal reflection on how a dark comedy anime about a hikikomori helped me understand my own struggles with anxiety, isolation, and finding a reason to keep going.

item.title: The PS Vita Deserved Better (╥﹏╥)
item.description: A love letter to Sony's forgotten handheld. Why the PlayStation Vita was years ahead of its time, and why I still play mine in 2026.

item.title: Why I Still Love React in 2026 (ﾉ◕ヮ◕)ﾉ*:・ﾟ✧
item.description: After years of framework wars, hot takes, and new shiny tools every week, React is still my favorite library. Here's why it stuck with me.

item.title: Welcome to Biagio Cyberspace ☆ﾟ.*・｡ﾟ
item.description: The grand opening of my personal corner of the web. A small introduction about who I am, what you'll find here, and why I decided to build this site in 2026.
